detail.description: Garrett Stubbs grounds out, second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Kyle Stowers.
Garrett Stubbs grounds out, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Kyle Stowers.

Phillies challenged (force play), call on the field was overturned: Garrett Stubbs reaches on a fielder's choice. Justin Crawford to 2nd. Justin Crawford advances to 2nd, on a missed catch error by shortstop Otto Lopez, assist to third baseman Javier Sanoja.
Garrett Stubbs grounds into a force out, second baseman Sung-Mun Song to shortstop Xander Bogaerts. Justin Crawford out at 2nd. Garrett Stubbs to 1st.
Garrett Stubbs pops out to shortstop Xander Bogaerts.
Garrett Stubbs lines out to center fielder Jackson Merrill.
Garrett Stubbs flies out to left fielder Heliot Ramos.
Garrett Stubbs grounds out to first baseman Casey Schmitt.
Garrett Stubbs bunt pops out softly to pitcher Lake Bachar.
Garrett Stubbs singles on a line drive to center fielder Jakob Marsee.
Garrett Stubbs lines out to second baseman Xavier Edwards.
Garrett Stubbs grounds out to first baseman Connor Norby.
Garrett Stubbs singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Kyle Stowers.
Garrett Stubbs flies out to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr.
Garrett Stubbs grounds out, second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson.
Garrett Stubbs singles on a ground ball to second baseman Ozzie Albies. Justin Crawford to 2nd.
Garrett Stubbs singles on a line drive to center fielder Eli White.
Garrett Stubbs singles on a fly ball to left fielder Isaac Collins.
Garrett Stubbs grounds into a force out, pitcher John Schreiber to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. Bryson Stott scores. Justin Crawford out at 2nd. Garrett Stubbs to 1st.
Garrett Stubbs flies out to left fielder Isaac Collins.
Garrett Stubbs out on a sacrifice fly to center fielder Matt Shaw. Alec Bohm scores.
Garrett Stubbs grounds out, third baseman Alex Bregman to first baseman Michael Busch.
Garrett Stubbs bunt grounds out softly, pitcher Edward Cabrera to first baseman Michael Busch.
